headline: Nvidia Deepens AI Infrastructure With Big Optics Bets And AI RAN Push
summary: Nvidia announced $2 billion investments each in Coherent and Lumentum to secure advanced optics for next generation AI data centers and "AI factories." Together, these moves expand Nvidia's role beyond chips into optical components and telecom infrastructure for future AI centric networks. Nvidia, ticker NasdaqGS:NVDA, is moving further into the...
